name: Shrimply Delicious Celery Sticks
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 ounces tiny shrimp, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients except the celery.
2. Mix well until combined.
3. Spoon about 2 teaspoons of shrimp mixture into each celery piece.
4. If desired, garnish with additional sliced green onions or chopped chives.
5. Cover; chill until serving.
28 snacks.
